mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.parent_id IS NULL AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_uuid = #{resourceUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.parent_id = #{parentId} AND r.is_deleted = 0
AND r.name_normalized LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceUuid}, #{spaceId}, NULL, 'folder', #{name}, #{nameNormalized}, NULL, 0, NULL, #{pathCache}, #{ownerUserId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM resources WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (resource_uuid, space_id, parent_id, resource_type, name, name_normalized, extension, size_bytes, object_id, path_cache, owner_user_id, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{resourceUuid}, #{spaceId}, #{parentId}, 'file', #{name}, #{nameNormalized}, #{extension}, #{sizeBytes}, #{objectId}, #{pathCache}, #{ownerUserId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.resource_uuid, r.space_id, r.parent_id, r.resource_type, r.name, r.name_normalized, r.extension, r.size_bytes, r.object_id, r.path_cache, r.owner_user_id, r.is_deleted, r.deleted_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM resources r JOIN users u ON r.owner_user_id = u.id WHERE u.user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND r.resource_type = 'folder' AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.parent_id ASC, r.name_normalized ASC, r.id ASC
